name: Sugar Sammy
bio: Sugar Sammy, born Samir Khullar, is a Canadian stand-up comedian from Montreal known for sharp crowd work and performing in English, French, Punjabi, and Hindi. He staged his first one-man show, Down with the Brown, in 2007 and broke through in Quebec with the bilingual hit You're Gonna Rire in 2012. His 2009 HBO Canada special became one of the network's highest-rated, and he later expanded into the French market.

timeline.ev: Debuts at the Montreal Just for Laughs festival
Stages his first one-man show, Down with the Brown
HBO Canada special becomes one of the network's highest-rated
Bilingual show You're Gonna Rire becomes a Quebec sensation
Moves to France to develop work for the French market

accolades: One of HBO Canada's highest-rated stand-up specials
Creator of the bilingual hit show You're Gonna Rire
